compiled_state.title: RED: Add structural tests for commands.lint support in validate.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## testing_mode: RED

Add structural boundary tests to tests/scripts/test-validate-config-driven.sh that assert validate.sh reads commands.lint from config.

## Tests to add

1. test_validate_reads_commands_lint_from_config: validate.sh must contain a CMD_LINT variable reading commands.lint via _cfg()
2. test_launched_checks_lint_when_cmd_lint_set: when commands.lint is configured, validate.sh adds 'lint' to LAUNCHED_CHECKS (not 'ruff mypy') — structural grep check
3. test_validate_warns_when_no_lint_configured: validate.sh must contain a [DSO WARN] path for when no lint command is configured (neither commands.lint nor the legacy pair)

## Files to modify
- tests/scripts/test-validate-config-driven.sh

## Acceptance criteria
- All 3 test cases added and fail (RED) before the implementation task runs
- Tests use structural grep assertions (not execution), consistent with existing tests in this file
- Tests pass after Task 2 GREEN implementation
